title: Hadoop MapReduce Output Format Directory
description:
The 'lib/output' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture houses classes defining diverse output formats. These include MapFileOutputFormat, SequenceFileAsBinaryOutputFormat, SequenceFileOutputFormat, and TextOutputFormat. These classes extend the FileOutputFormat, providing specialized functionalities for writing key-value pairs to different file formats. MapFileOutputFormat writes to MapFiles, SequenceFileAsBinaryOutputFormat to binary SequenceFiles, SequenceFileOutputFormat to compressible SequenceFiles, and TextOutputFormat to plain text files with optional Gzip compression. Collaboration occurs through inheritance from FileOutputFormat, implementation of custom RecordWriter classes, and management of compression settings, ensuring flexibility and efficiency in storing MapReduce job outputs.

These extend FileOutputFormat, providing specialized writing functionalities for MapFiles, binary SequenceFiles, compressible SequenceFiles, and Gzip-compressed text files, respectively. Collaboration is achieved via inheritance, custom RecordWriter implementation, and compression setting management, ensuring efficient and flexible MapReduce output storage.
